meaning: adv.以后,后来,以前 prep.自从,自...以来 conj.自...以后,自...以来,因为,既然
examples: She's been off work since Tuesday.
Polling has been heavy since 8 a.m.
Our list consists of no-load diversified U.S. equity funds with the best records since March 2000.
Norway, which is not an EU member, has had a 40% quota since 2003.
